ros::message_traits::FalseType Struct Reference

Base type for compile-type true/false tests. Compatible with Boost.MPL. classes inheriting from this type are false values. More...

#include <message_traits.h>

Static Public Attributes

static const bool value = false
 

Detailed Description

Base type for compile-type true/false tests. Compatible with Boost.MPL. classes inheriting from this type are false values.
